page: Microsoft Azure A8m_v2 is a memory-intensive virtual machine belonging to the Av2 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8171M processor operating at 2.6 GHz. The x86_64 architecture includes 32 KB of L1d cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 35 MB of L3 cache, with support for AVX and AVX512F instruction sets. The server is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core, alongside 82 GB of local storage. No GPU resources are included.

Benchmark evaluations indicate that the A8m_v2 exhibits limited processing power. In CPU-focused tests, the server recorded a stress-ng single-core score of 356.79 and a multi-core score of 2763.6, placing its compute capabilities in the bottom 10% and 25% respectively. Memory performance is similarly constrained, with a PassMark memory score of 852.18 and uncached read bandwidth of 32.02 GB/sec. Cryptographic and compression tasks also reflect lower-tier performance, as shown by a single-threaded gzip compression speed of 7.38 GB/sec and a PassMark CPU encryption score of 1252.95.

Given its hardware profile, the A8m_v2 offers a cost-effective solution for memory-heavy workloads that do not demand high-performance computing. The generous 64.0 GB RAM capacity makes it suitable for hosting moderate database operations, basic Redis caching layers, or lightweight web serving, where memory footprint is more critical than raw CPU throughput. However, the server is poorly suited for compute-intensive tasks, software compilation, or modern machine learning inference due to its low processing benchmarks.
description: Microsoft Azure A8m_v2 is an x86_64 memory-intensive virtual machine from the Av2 family, running on Microsoft Hyper-V. It is configured with 8 dedicated vCPUs and 8 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8171M processor at 2.6 GHz, featuring 64.0 GB of RAM (8.0 GB per core) and 82 GB of local storage. Benchmark results place its compute and memory performance in the lower tiers, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 2763.6 and a PassMark memory score of 852.18. This server provides a cost-effective option for memory-reliant workloads that do not require high processing speeds, such as moderate database operations, basic Redis caching, and lightweight web serving.
og_description: Microsoft Azure A8m_v2 is a memory-intensive virtual machine featuring 8 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 64 GB of RAM, and 82 GB of local storage, designed for budget-conscious, memory-reliant workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure A8m_v2 is an 8-vCPU memory-intensive virtual machine with 64 GB RAM and 82 GB local storage, running on Intel Xeon processors.
tagline: An entry-level memory-intensive virtual machine featuring a high memory-to-core ratio for budget-conscious database and caching workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8171M vCPUs running at 2.6 GHz
64.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
82 GB of local storage included without GPU accelerators
Suitable for memory-intensive, low-compute workloads like Redis caching
Cost-effective resource allocation for moderate database operations
